news.headline: RUSSIAN DEFENCE MINISTRY: RUSSIAN TROOPS ARE OBSERVING CEASEFIRE - REPORTRS

news.summary: In Toronto, the World Ovarian Cancer Coalition has launched the Global Expert Advisory Group on Ovarian Cancer on World Ovarian Cancer Day (#WOCD2025). This initiative aims to raise awareness about ovarian cancer as a crucial global health concern. Ovarian cancer, the deadliest of female cancers, lacks a dependable screening test and faces substantial diagnostic challenges, putting countless lives at risk. This issue is even more pressing in low- and middle-income nations, where a significant number of individuals are affected.
news.headline: World Ovarian Cancer Coalition establishes Global Expert Advisory Group to combat ovarian cancer, a leading cause of female cancer deaths. #WOCD2025.

news.summary: During the recent May Day holiday in Hong Kong, there was a substantial increase in orders from supermarkets and department stores, more than 1.7 times higher than usual. This spike was driven by a surge in domestic travel and consumer spending during the holiday period. Instant delivery service platforms experienced higher demand due to strong consumer interest.
news.headline: SF Intra-city delivery orders rose by 87% during May Day holiday. Supermarket and department store orders surged by over 1.7 times.

news.summary: The Digital Cooperation Organization (DCO) and Pakistan's government have wrapped up the first-ever Digital Foreign Direct Investment Forum 2025, bringing together 700 leaders from around the world. Pakistan has introduced the inaugural national implementation of the DCO Digital FDI Initiative, involving a substantial investment of $700 million.
news.headline: Pakistan hosts DCO's DFDI Forum, with 700 leaders attending. Pakistan initiates Digital FDI Initiative with $700M investment.

news.summary: Today, Emera, listed on the TSX as EMA, released its first quarter financial report for 2025 from Halifax, Nova Scotia. The company showcased strong performance with impressive growth numbers. The adjusted earnings per share (EPS) for the quarter rose by 68% to $1.28 compared to $0.76 in the first quarter of the previous year. The reported EPS for Q1 in 2025 increased to $1.96 from $0.73 in Q1 2024, mainly attributed to market-to-market (“MTM”) gains recorded this year compared to MTM losses in the previous year.
news.headline: Emera (TSX: EMA) reports strong Q1 2025 financial results - EPS grew 68% to $1.28, reported EPS increased to $1.96.

news.summary: On May 8, 2025, Clear Secure, Inc. (NYSE: YOU) has released its financial results for the first quarter of 2025. The information was shared in a shareholder letter available on the company's Investor Relations website at https://ir.clearme.com. To discuss these results, CLEAR will conduct a conference call today at 8:00 AM (ET). Investors and analysts can participate in the live teleconference call. For more details, the complete story is accessible on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Clear Secure, Inc. (NYSE: YOU) releases Q1 2025 financial results, details in shareholder letter on website. Conference call at 8:00 AM (ET) today.

news.summary: Prestige Consumer Healthcare Inc. reported Q4 revenue of $296.5 million, a 7.0% increase from the previous year, with organic revenue growing 7.9%. Fiscal 2025 revenue was $1,137.8 million, up 1.1%, with diluted EPS of $4.29 and adjusted EPS of $4.52. Leverage reduced to 2.4x. Initial fiscal 2026 outlook projects 1-2% organic revenue growth and EPS of $4.70 to $4.82. Cash flow in Q4 was $61.8 million and for fiscal 2025 was $251.5 million. Segment reviews showed growth in North American and International OTC Healthcare. Company outlook projects overcoming challenges for continued growth. Visit the Company's website for more details on their financials and products.
news.headline: Prestige Consumer Healthcare Inc. achieves record revenue and earnings in fiscal 2025 - $296.5M in Q4, $1,137.8M in total. EPS of $4.29, reduced leverage to 2.4x. Forecasting 1%-2% organic revenue growth and $4.70-$4.82 EPS for fiscal 2026.

news.summary: Crawford United Corporation reported strong financial results for the quarter ended March 31, 2025. Sales amounted to $43.3 million, a 12.7% increase from the same period in 2024. Operating income rose to $4.9 million, showing a 7.0% increase. Net income was $3.1 million, or $0.88 per fully diluted share, up 4.5% from the first quarter of 2024. EBITDA As Defined increased slightly to $6.8 million. The company's President and CEO, Brian Powers, expressed confidence in achieving long-term strategic goals and highlighted surpassing prior quarterly sales records. Crawford United Corporation serves diverse markets with specialized industrial products and operates in segments such as Commercial Air Handling Equipment and Industrial & Transportation Products. The company is positioned for growth and profitability through increased revenue opportunities and potential acquisitions.
news.headline: Crawford United Corp reported $43.3M sales in Q1 2025, up $5.9M from last quarter. Net income of $3.1M & EPS $0.88.

news.summary: Gogoro Inc., a global technology leader in battery swapping ecosystems, reported its financial results for Q1 2025. The revenue was $63.6 million, a decrease of 8.7% YoY. Battery swapping service revenue was $34.5 million, up 6.2% YoY. Hardware and others revenue was $29.1 million, down 21.8% YoY. Gross margin was 4.9%, down from 6.4% YoY. Net loss was $18.6 million compared to $13.1 million last year. Adjusted EBITDA was $14.3 million, up from $10.2 million. Gogoro is focusing on operational efficiency, cost reduction, and profitability milestones. They expect their battery swapping business to reach profitability in 2026 and hardware sales business in 2028. The company aims to save $25 million in 2025 through cost efficiency plans. They reiterated a revenue forecast of $295 million to $315 million for 2025, with emphasis on the Taiwan market. Gogoro plans to complete their ongoing battery upgrade initiatives by the end of 2025, impacting their gross margin in the short term. Gogoro expects to have sufficient funding to meet near-term growth objectives. Through optimization efforts and strategic plans, Gogoro remains committed to sustainable growth and creating long-term shareholder value.
news.headline: Gogoro's Q1 2025 results: $63.6M revenue, battery service rev up 6.2% to $34.5M, net loss $18.6M, adjusted EBITDA $14.3M. Focus on profitability milestones and cost reduction, with $25M savings expected in 2025. SWOT ongoing and gross margin impacted temporarily due to battery upgrades. Company plans for non-IFRS profitability by 2026 and 2028 in respective segments. Taiwan market forecasted stable, full-year revenue forecast between $295M to $315M, with significant focus on operational and cost efficiencies. Aiming for long-term growth and shareholder value creation.

news.summary: Boston-based Haemonetics Corporation (NYSE: HAE) recently disclosed their financials for the fourth quarter and fiscal year ending March 29, 2025. news.headline: Haemonetics' fiscal year 2025 earnings released online; Q4 ended March 29, 2025. Accessible on Investor Relations website.

news.summary: In San Jose, California, on May 8, 2025, Valley Christian Schools (VCS) reached a notable achievement by having their Team Wildfire Quest progress to the Technical Verification stage of the $11 million XPRIZE Wildfire challenge. This makes them the exclusive high school team to do so, showcasing their innovation in tackling the wildfire issue.
news.headline: Valley Christian Schools' students advance to the Technical Verification round of the $11 million XPRIZE Wildfire competition in San Jose.

news.summary: On May 8, 2025, Quebecor Inc. announced its financial results for the first quarter of 2025. During this period, Quebecor reported cash flows generated from operating activities. The corporation, also known as Quebecor, unveiled its consolidated financial figures for the initial quarter of 2025.
news.headline: Quebecor Inc. reports Q1 2025 results, including cash flows from operations. May 8, 2025 PRNewswire.

GAAP income from operations stood at 7.6% of revenues, while non-GAAP income from operations was higher at 13.5% of revenues for the same period. First quarter GAAP diluted EPS was $1.28, down by $0.69 from the previous period, while non-GAAP diluted EPS...
news.headline: EPAM's Q1 2025 revenues reached $1.302B, up by 11.7% YOY. GAAP income from ops stood at 7.6% of revenues.

news.summary: In Kingsey Falls, Canada, Cascades Inc. (TSX: CAS) has released its unaudited financial results for the quarter ending on March 31, 2025. Key points from the first quarter of 2025 include sales totaling $1,154 million, which is a slight decrease from $1,211 million in the previous quarter and an increase from $1,109 million in the same period last year. Operating...
news.headline: Cascades Inc. reports Q1 2025 sales of $1,154 million, down from $1,211 million in Q4 2024. Operating results not provided.

news.summary: Home buyers purchasing newly constructed homes are benefitting from reduced mortgage rates, with rates dropping by approximately 0.5%. Additionally, the median list prices for new construction properties have decreased, resulting in a narrower price difference compared to existing homes, the smallest margin seen since 2020. In response to market demands, builders in 26 out of the top 100 U.S. metropolitan areas have begun offering smaller and more affordable homes. These trends are particularly noticeable in cities like Austin.
news.headline: New construction boosts affordability with lower mortgage rates and prices, reducing price gap with existing homes. Smaller, cheaper homes delivered in 26 top U.S. metros, but tariffs may hinder progress.

news.summary: Solidion Technology, Inc. revealed on May 8, 2025, that their patented platform technology can transform existing lithium-ion plants into solid-state battery manufacturers. The company, listed as NASDAQ:STI, is known for its advanced battery solutions. This innovative approach could potentially revolutionize the industry by leveraging current infrastructure for future battery production.
news.headline: Solidion plans to revolutionize lithium-ion battery industry by converting current facilities to solid-state producers.

news.summary: In Boston on May 8, 2025, the IEC Group acknowledged G-P (Globalization Partners) for its advanced technology and dedication to becoming the top global EOR provider. G-P, a remote-first company, was hailed as the foremost global employment leader in the industry.
news.headline: G-P (Globalization Partners) tops IEC Dynamic Map and named global EOR leader for third year.

news.summary: This year, Vienna, Va. saw remarkable contributions in the realm of employment for individuals with disabilities. Shockingly, more than 63% of working-age individuals with disabilities remain unemployed. The awards highlighted the significant efforts made by individuals, nonprofits, and businesses in addressing this issue. SourceAmerica®, serving as an authorized enterprise of AbilityOne®, played a central role in this initiative. The event celebrated transformative contributions aiming to improve the employment prospects of individuals with disabilities, shedding light on the urgency of the situation and the need for collective action.
news.headline: SourceAmerica recognizes leaders in disability employment at 2025 Xforce Conference, featuring 63% unemployment rate.

news.summary: Marengo Therapeutics, Inc. has announced the commencement of the STARt-002 clinical trial. This Phase 1b/2 study aims to evaluate the efficacy of invikafusp alfa when combined with Gilead's Trodelvy® in treating HR+/HER2- and TNBC breast cancer patients. The trial will involve patients from prominent breast cancer centers in the United States and Canada. The study officially began in Cambridge, Massachusetts on May 8, 2025. This collaborative research endeavor is set to engage a significant number of participants and healthcare professionals in the oncology field, reflecting the company's dedication to advancing breast cancer treatment.
news.headline: Marengo initiates STARt-002 trial with dual T cell agonist Invikafusp Alfa with Trodelvy® for breast cancer patients.

news.summary: Maple Leaf Foods, a company trading under TSX: MFI and accessible at www.mapleleaffoods.com, announced an 8.2% increase in revenue. The company reported an Adjusted EBITDA of $166 million, representing 13.4% growth. Additionally, Maple Leaf Foods restated its fiscal 2025 guidance. The news was shared from Mississauga, ON, on May 8, 2025.
news.headline: Maple Leaf Foods' Q1 2025: Revenue up 8.2%, Adjusted EBITDA $166M (13.4%). Company reaffirms fiscal 2025 guidance.

news.summary: In Oakland, California, on May 8, 2025, NextGen Jane, a women's health company specializing in menstrual diagnostics for gynecological care, revealed that it secured a major grant. The grant received is an SBIR Direct to Phase II grant from the prestigious Eunice Kennedy Shriver National Institute of Child Health. This grant is significant for NextGen Jane's research and development efforts.
news.headline: NextGen Jane receives second NIH grant for evaluating non-invasive endometriosis diagnostic.

news.summary: On May 8, 2025, in Victoria, Seychelles, MEXC, a prominent global cryptocurrency exchange, revealed its plans to list Shardeum (SHM) in the Innovation Zone. This listing is set to take place on May 8, 2025, according to Coordinated Universal Time (UTC). To mark this important development, MEXC has initiated three exclusive events.
news.headline: MEXC lists Shardeum (SHM) with 72,000 SHM and 150,000 USDT bonuses in Innovation Zone on May 8, 2025.

news.summary: Renowned cyber resiliency specialist Tony Giannini has recently joined Assured to spearhead a critical strategic effort, as the company's worldwide growth gains momentum. Assured Data Protection (Assured), a leading IT managed services provider specializing in cloud data protection, has welcomed Giannini amidst its strategic expansion. The appointment signifies a significant development in Assured's trajectory as it continues to solidify its position in the industry.
news.headline: Assured Data Protection launches innovation team, hires Tony Giannini to lead global expansion - May 8, 2025.

news.summary: On May 8, 2025, EPAM Systems, Inc. announced that Arkadiy Dobkin, the Principal Founder and current CEO, will transition to the role of Executive Chairman effective September 1, 2025. Balazs Fejes has been appointed as the incoming President and Chief Executive Officer. EPAM is listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol EPAM. This change in leadership is a strategic decision for the company and marks a significant milestone in its corporate governance.
news.headline: EPAM founder Arkadiy Dobkin to step down as CEO, Balazs Fejes to take over on Sept 1, 2025. (Numbers not provided)

news.summary: Houston-based Genesis Energy, L.P. (NYSE: GEL) released its first quarter financial results, reporting a net loss of $469.1 million in 2025, a significant decrease from the $11.4 million net income reported in the first quarter of 2024. Cash flows from operating activities also declined to $24.8 million in 2025 compared to $125.9 million in the same period last year.
news.headline: Genesis Energy, L.P. reports Net Loss of $469.1 million in Q1 2025 compared to Net Income of $11.4 million in Q1 2024. Operating Cash Flows decreased to $24.8 million from $125.9 million in the same period.

news.summary: Atlanta-headquartered Gray Media, Inc. (NYSE: GTN) revealed its financial performance for the quarter ending on March 31, 2025. The company reported total revenues exceeding the upper limit of their forecast and total operating expenses falling under their guidance for the quarter. Notably, broadcasting operating expenses saw a year-over-year decrease for the first time since the pandemic related slowdown in 2020. A significant achievement was the reduction of outstanding debt by $17 million in the first quarter of 2025.
news.headline: Gray Media announced Q1 2025 financial results: total revenues exceeded guidance, operating expenses below forecast, $17M debt reduction.
Enerflex Ltd. reports Q1 2025 financial and operational results.

news.summary: Calgary-based company Cenovus Energy Inc. revealed its financial and operating outcomes for the first quarter of 2025. They reported over $1.3 billion in cash generated from operating activities, $2.2 billion in adjusted funds flow, and $983 million in free funds flow. Upstream production showed a rise to 818,900 barrels of oil equivalent per day (BOE/d), while Downstream crude throughput reached 665,400 barrels per day (bbls/d), indicating an overall utilization rate of 92%.
news.headline: Cenovus Energy reports $1.3B cash, $2.2B adjusted funds flow, $983M free funds flow in Q1 2025 with 818,900 BOE/d production.

news.summary: In Hillsboro, Oregon, Lattice Semiconductor Corporation (Nasdaq: LSCC) revealed its participation in the 53rd Annual J.P. Morgan Global Technology, Media and Communications Conference on May 13, 2025, at the Westin Seaport District Hotel in Boston. The event will feature talks by Ford Tamer, CEO, Lorenzo Flores, CFO, and Rick Muscha, VP of Investor Relations, focusing on Lattice Semiconductor’s strategic outlook.
news.headline: Lattice Semiconductor to present at J.P. Morgan Conference on May 13, 2025 at Westin Seaport in Boston. CEO, CFO, and VP to discuss company's strategy. $LSCC

news.summary: In a recent joint announcement, Vertical Aerospace (EVTL) and Honeywell (HON) revealed a new extended partnership agreement solidifying Honeywell's dedication to certifying and manufacturing Vertical's electric vertical take-off and landing (eVTOL) aircraft, the VX4. This long-term agreement will see Honeywell and Vertical collaborating closely to certify two crucial systems on the VX4. This collaboration marks a significant step forward in the advancement of electric vertical aircraft technology.
news.headline: Vertical Aerospace and Honeywell extend partnership to bring VX4 eVTOL to market. NYSE: EVTL, NASDAQ: HON collaborate on production and certification.

news.summary: SAN JUAN CAPISTRANO, California - The Indoor Lab, a prominent agnostic LiDAR perception software company, has appointed Randy Lack as its new Chief Revenue Officer (CRO). Randy, previous Global General Manager of Computer Vision at Dell Technologies, will lead the company’s global revenue strategy, enterprise partnerships, and market expansion efforts. This move comes as The Indoor Lab prepares for significant growth, with Randy's expertise playing a vital role in driving its transformative phase.
news.headline: The Indoor Lab appoints Randy Lack as Chief Revenue Officer to drive global expansion. Randy, former GM at Dell, will lead revenue strategy to accelerate growth.

news.summary: In Arlington, Texas, First Rate has introduced a new Alts Data Management solution aimed at streamlining processes, minimizing mistakes, and providing immediate information for alternative investments. This launch is geared towards automation of workflows and error reduction, offering real-time insights for alternative investments.
news.headline: First Rate introduces Alts Data Management solution in Arlington, Texas to streamline wealth management with automated workflows and real-time insights.

news.summary: ACI Worldwide, a global payments technology pioneer, released its financial results for the quarter ending March 31, 2025 in Omaha, Nebraska. Thomas Warsop, the president and CEO, expressed satisfaction with the Q1 performance, stating that it exceeded expectations. The newly created Payment Software segment, merging the Bank and Merchant segments, experienced a revenue growth of 42%. The company noted continued robust performance in its Issuing and Acquiring segments. The company's stock is listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol ACIW.
news.headline: ACI Worldwide reports Q1 2025 financial results. Payment Software segment revenue grew 42%. CEO pleased with results.

news.summary: A company based in Costa Mesa, California, Experian®, has recently won the 2025 HR Tech Award from Lighthouse Research & Advisory. The award was given in recognition of Experian's Tax Withholding Solution.
news.headline: Experian wins 2025 HR Tech Award for Tax Withholding Solution from Lighthouse Research & Advisory.

news.summary: On May 8, 2025, Atour Lifestyle Holdings Limited, a prominent hospitality and lifestyle firm in China, disclosed their plan to release their unaudited financial results for the first quarter of 2025 on May 22, 2025, prior to the opening of U.S. markets. news.headline: Atour Lifestyle Holdings Limited to release Q1 2025 financial results on May 22, 2025. Leading China hospitality company.

news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on May 8, 2025, Titan Mining Corporation (TSX: TI, OTCQB: TIMCF) shared that they have secured 43,943 acres of mineral rights in St. Lawrence County, New York. With this addition, Titan now possesses more than 120,000 acres of mineral tenure in upstate New York. This acquisition boosts the potential for discovering more zinc, graphite, and iron-oxide copper gold ("IOCG") deposits.
news.headline: Titan Mining expands mineral tenure in Upstate New York with 43,943 acres, totaling over 120,000 acres for zinc, graphite, and IOCG resources.
Lamar Advertising Co. reports Q1 2025 operating results for March 31, with promising numbers.

news.summary: A Phase 1 clinical trial is set to begin in the second half of 2025 to assess the pharmacokinetics (PK) of denifanstat and resmetirom combined. The data from this trial is anticipated to be released in the first half of 2026.
news.headline: Sagimet Biosciences reports Q1 2025 financial results and plans Phase 1 trial for denifanstat and resmetirom combination in 2H 2025, with data expected in 1H 2026.

news.summary: In the first quarter, the total digital revenue increased by 6.4% year over year, reaching a total digital segment profit growth of 16.2% year over year. Digital revenue accounted for 57% of the Q1 net revenue and 62% of the segment profit.
news.headline: Townsquare exceed Q1 earnings expectations with Total Digital Revenue up 6.4% YOY and 57% of Q1 Net Revenue. Segment Profit grew 16.2% YOY, with digital contributing to 62% and reaffirms full year guidance.

news.summary: Charlotte, North Carolina - On May 8, 2025, DENTSPLY SIRONA Inc. disclosed its financial results for the initial quarter of 2025. Operating under the ticker symbol "XRAY" on Nasdaq, the Company provided an overview of its performance.
news.headline: Dentsply Sirona's Q1 2025 financial results announced, Nasdaq: XRAY mentioned. Charlotte, N.C. - May 08, 2025.

Through effective strategies and operations, the company has achieved significant milestones, positioning itself for continued success.
news.headline: Privia Health's Q1 2025 financial results show strong performance, enters Arizona, and raises FY'25 outlook.
